message:
fix(rpc): implement missing OpDepTree handler in handleRequest switch (bd-13)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/onyx
Rig: beads
Role: polecats

files.patch:
@@ -197,6 +197,8 @@ func (s *Server) handleRequest(req *Request) Response {
 		resp = s.handleDepAdd(req)
 	case OpDepRemove:
 		resp = s.handleDepRemove(req)
+	case OpDepTree:
+		resp = s.handleDepTree(req)
 	case OpLabelAdd:
 		resp = s.handleLabelAdd(req)
 	case OpLabelRemove:
